blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You sit down at your desk. This is different.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Why did you actually say yes to this trip? You say no to everything.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: I ask a lot of things you don't do.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: This one felt like it had a reason behind it.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: I haven't heard you laugh in a while. Not really.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: That's a strange thing to notice.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: I don't track it. I just noticed.

blocks.prompt: She said something real. What does Julian do with it?

options.label: He says nothing. He looks at the water.
"The light on the water is different in the morning."
